signals.title: AUD/USD — Geopolitical + Positioning + R
signals.text: AUD/USD at 0.7152 — Middle East tensions drive risk-off. AUD COT LF net long +47,218, long%=74.3% (specs long AUD). Retail 87% short AUD/USD — extreme short bias diverges from COT direction. RBA 4.10% vs Fed 3.75% — 35bp AUD carry premium. Watch for a potential short-squeeze if AUD/USD breaks above 0.7200.

signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
signals.text: USD/JPY at 159.49 — 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains bid; Middle East tensions introduce intervention risk on a break above 160.00. JPY COT LF short −80,578 — crowded carry unwind risk in risk-off. Carry dominates until VIX > 25; 160.00 is the key intervention threshold.

signals.title: EUR/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: EUR/USD at 1.1716 — HV30 at 8.2%, ATM IV at 9.4% — options pricing a 1.2 vol-pt premium over realized. 25d RR at −0.14: mild put skew despite the bullish price trend — market hedging rather than chasing. CFTC LF net +289k (week ending Apr 15), WoW delta −1,101 for second consecutive week; AM not reducing. Price bid, positioning stalling — late-trend caution signal. A LF delta turning positive would invalidate the caution read.

signals.title: GBP/USD — CB + Technical
signals.text: BoE 3.75% vs Fed 3.75% — 0bp GBP carry neutral; pair anchored by positioning. GBP LF net long +33,517, AM constructive — institutional bid intact. ATM IV 9.5% near HV, 25d RR flat — options neutral. GBP/USD at 1.3517; 1.3600 is the next resistance on a continuation.

signals.title: NZD/USD — COT + OIS Divergence
signals.text: NZD/USD COT LF net short −18,062 (specs fading a hawkish CB) vs RBNZ hike 100% priced for 27 May. If RBNZ delivers or signals hike, short-squeeze risk is elevated — crowded spec short unwind targets 0.5900+. NZD/USD at 0.5878.
